title: Figure 1 in RCR-RFLP approach for identification of cryptic species of Bombus lucorum-complex in Northern European Russia
author: Bovykina, Galina V.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. RFLP bands after enzymatic digestion of COI PCR products for Bombus lucorum-complex species: A) bands after AhlI digestion of B. lucorum (Api26, Api27, Api80) and B. cryptarum (Api69, Api94); B) bands after BamHI digestion of B. terrestris (Api335, Api337) and B. cryptarum (Api339, Api340, Api341). M – molecularweight marker (100 bp + 1.5 Kb).
steps_raw: Figure 1. RFLP bands after enzymatic digestion of COI PCR products for Bombus lucorum-complex species: A) bands after AhlI digestion of B. lucorum (Api26, Api27, Api80) and B. cryptarum (Api69, Api94); B) bands after BamHI digestion of B. terrestris (Api335, Api337) and B. cryptarum (Api339, Api340, Api341). M – molecularweight marker (100 bp + 1.5 Kb).
